hypothesis: Equipping the LLM agent with a CALPHAD-derived local sensitivity oracle that returns the gradients of equilibrium phase fractions with respect to temperature and overall oxygen fraction at the current state will increase its success rate (by the paper’s success criterion) on multi-phase targets (Challenges 2 and 3) from 0/10 to at least 5/10 over 10 runs without additional prompt tuning, while keeping the median number of tool calls per run at or below 15.
